author: @ernestlemmingway1124
text:
Joe and Jeremy both need a lesson in current geopolitics. The attack on Iran is not about Iran, it's about China. Everything Trump has done--for good and ill--since being reelected has been about crippling the rogue state and its allies. Venezuela, Iran, Cuba, they're all proxy states of the CCP and keys to their global strategy. Iran and Venezuela in particular were critical oil suppliers for the CCP and Iran was a geographical keystone in their Belt and Road Initiative. Now their plans are in complete disarray, their weapons and defenses are proven useless, and the Chinese people are teetering on revolt over the Party's responses to the trade war, much less the attacks.
I'm ambivalent about this. Military action was always inevitable given the ayatollahs' stubbornness. But Netanyahu forced us to do so _now_ because he wasn't willing to wait.

author: @Cwin-ny6bp
text: Rogan’s take on Iran is dumb. Conflict was inevitable, and none of it is inconsistent with what Trump ran on. He’s been saying Iran cannot have nuclear weapons for something like 2 decades. Rogan and a lot of the so called “America first” right would sacrifice millions tomorrow as long as we can kick the can down the road a bit. The US should have done this 47 years ago when feckless Jimmy Carter allowed the Ayatollah to take over. The fact that he cannot figure out why we would invade a country with highly sophisticated ballistic missile and drone programs, a country that told us they had the fuel for 11 nuclear weapons, a country that has repeatedly stated their intention to use them against the US, a country that is the #1 state sponsor of terror and directly or indirectly responsible for thousands of American deaths, and a country that we convicted multiple agents of for plots against our President, is frankly baffling. Let’s sacrifice millions tomorrow, because God forbid we use our military to proactively take out an active and ongoing threat. Roughly 20% of the soldiers we lost in Iraq were attributed directly to Iran. We lost 200+ marines in Beirut to Hezbollah. The Houthis are regularly harassing commercial shipping lanes.

text: I am a fan of Joe Rogan, but I do not take him to be the Oracle of truth, the absolute mouth of God. Even on the conventional side, without nuclear weapons, the Iranian stock pile of ICBMs was getting to the point where it would be overwhelming for anyone to oppose them.
